titleStmt.title: SII 15.253: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 253. (B.K. No. 14 of 1926-27.) GADAG, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the wall of an enclosure to the left of the well in the Vīranārāyaṇa temple.
This is dated Śaka 1461, Vikāri, Bhādrapada śu. 12, Tuesday, corresponding to 1539 A.D., August 26.

It records the gift of Ānandanidhi to the Brāhmaṇas by the king, in the presence of the god Viṭhalēśvara on the bank of the Tuṅgabhadrā. It adds that the gift was recorded on stone in the presence of the god Vīranārāyaṇa who had conferred his boon on the poet Kumāra-Vyāsa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubamastu . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūla staṁbhāya
śaṁbhavē . svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrī prithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vī
rapratāpa śrī Acyutarāya mahārāyaru vijayanagariya nelevīḍinoḷu su
khasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyvuttamiralu śakava¨rpa 1461 neya vikāri saṁva
tsarada bhādrapada śudha śravaṇa 12 maṁgaḷavāra puṇyakāladūḷu bhāskarakṣē
tra tuṁgabhadrātīra viṭhṭhalēśvarana saṁnidhiyali mādhavaprītya¨rthavāgi Ā
naṁdanidhiyeṁba dānavanu koṭṭu samasta bhūsuraranu saṁtōṣaṁbaḍisida praśa
stiyanu saṁskrutabhāṣākavitvadali śā¨rdūlavikrīḍitaveṁba vṛttaṁgaḷanu . kavi
kumāravyāsaṁge prasaṁnanāda gadugina śrīvīranārāyaṇana saṁnidhiyalli śilā
śāsanakke barasida dha¨rmmakī¨rtipraśastiya vṛttaṁgaḷa kramaveṁtaṁdoḍe . vra .
śākē caṁdrarasāmarēṁdragaṇitē va¨rṣē vikā¨ryyāhvayē . pakṣē bhādrapada
sya pōṣitavidhau . dvādaśyabhikhyē tithau . vārē bhūmisutasya viṣṇvadhipatau tārē cyutakṣmā
pati¨rdatvānaṁdanidhiṁ dvijāndhanadayaṁnāmōdayanmādhavaṁ . 1 . puṇyaughaiḥ paripālita
sya paritō bhūtāḷisaṁmēṣṭitā sadva¨rggai�svavaśīkṛtasya satatākkrāṁtābhujaṁga
vrajaiḥ . prāptasyātinavapraśastimadhikaprakhyātaśau¨ryyācyutakṣmāpānaṁdanidhē¨rnavā
pi nidhayaḥ kiṁ tē labhaṁtē tulāṁ .
Digital edition of SII 15.253 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
